# Takakurakazuki (たかくらかずき)

> Japanese contemporary artist, b.1987, Yamanashi Prefecture. Based in Saga Prefecture. MFA Tokyo Zokei University. Working with video games, pixel art, XR, AI, and ceramics, exploring physicality and ritual in the digital age through East Asian thought. Core concept: PLAY = PRAY.

## Artist Statement

Takakurakazuki creates works using digital media such as video games, pixel art, XR, and AI, drawing on Eastern thought—particularly Esoteric Buddhism, Shinbutsu-shūgō (the syncretism of Shinto and Buddhism), and cultures of belief surrounding yōkai and spirits. At the center of his practice is the proposition "PLAY = PRAY." Ritual implements used to access realms beyond the human world are structurally equivalent to controllers used to access the world beyond the screen. Game characters, as vessels for one's own soul, function as yorishiro—spirit dwellings—within virtual space.

## Key Projects

- [GINZA SIX: Hyperman](https://studiotokoyo.com/ginza-six-spring-2025-into-the-deep-nature): 2025. Large-scale installation reconfiguring Esoteric Buddhist Five Elements into character form.
- [Mechareal](https://studiotokoyo.com/mechareal): 2023. Museum solo show at Yamanashi Prefectural Museum of Art. AI, pixel animation, 3D printing, VR, NFTs.
- [GAME OVER: Butsudan Game](https://studiotokoyo.com/game-over): 2025. Game cabinet crafted by traditional Buddhist altar maker Mizota Butsudan. Mizuma Gallery Singapore.
- [Characters = Characters](https://studiotokoyo.com/characters-characters): 2025–2026. Solo exhibition at Hyper Museum Hanno with 10+ playable game works.
- [HYPER SHRINE PROJECT](https://studiotokoyo.com/hyper-shrine-project): Ongoing. Participatory art deifying digital file formats as KAMI. Permanently installed at Naoshima.
- [Character Matrix](https://studiotokoyo.com/character-matrix): 2024. Curated group exhibition at BUG Art Center, Tokyo.
- [Viral Fudo Myo-o](https://studiotokoyo.com/viral-fudo-myo-o): 2024–2025. LED panel sculpture responding to real-time social media "enjo" data.
- [Video Games: Play=Pray](https://studiotokoyo.com/video-games-playpray): Satori Yugi OHENRO 88 (action RPG) and Mani Yugi TOKOYO (Steam).
- [BUDDHA VERSE](https://studiotokoyo.com/buddha-verse): NFT and canvas series reconsidering Buddhist figures as characters.
- [Denno Samaya / Ceramics](https://studiotokoyo.com/ginza-six-into-the-deep-nature): 2026. Ceramic series with Gyokuhōgama kiln. Game controllers meet esoteric Buddhist samaya.
- [Indra's Net](https://studiotokoyo.com/indras-net): 2025. SNS-based artwork exploring Buddhist network metaphors.
- [Update Samsara](https://studiotokoyo.com/update-samsara): 2021. VR/installation/NFT series on continuous updates as saṃsāra.
- [Emoji Kaido 53](https://studiotokoyo.com/emoji-kaido-53): 2020–2021. Emoji mosaic reimagining of Tōkaidō 53 stations.
- [MAYOKAGE: Digital Wayang Kulit](https://studiotokoyo.com/mayokage-digital-wayang-kulit): Japanese yōkai meets Indonesian shadow puppet theater.

## Solo Exhibitions

- 2025: Hyperman Ban Gogh-O — GINZA SIX, Tokyo
- 2025: Hyper Shrine 6D — Naoshima Ryokan ROKA, Kagawa
- 2025: Characters = Characters — Hyper Museum Hanno, Saitama
- 2025: Indra Net — SIGNAL, Tokyo
- 2025: Viral Fudo Myoo — YOD Terada Complex, Tokyo
- 2025: 1/YOU/0 (Public Art) — Umekita Green Place, Osaka
- 2024: Nature Attains Buddhahood — aki gallery, Taipei
- 2023: Mechareal — Yamanashi Prefectural Museum of Art
- 2023: AI Yokai Summoning Ritual — NEORT++, Tokyo
- 2022: Imaginary War — YOD TOKYO / YOD Editions
- 2021: Update Samsara ver4.0 — TOH, Tokyo
- 2017: Umwelt — Recruit Guardian Garden, Tokyo

## Group Exhibitions

- 2025: Art Bit Matrix — Mizuma Gallery Singapore
- 2025: sora select TOKYO — OpenAI / Shibuya Cine Quinto
- 2024: Character Matrix (Curation) — BUG Art Center, Tokyo
- 2024: ICC Annual 2024 — NTT InterCommunication Center [ICC]
- 2024: Future Exhibition — SusHi Tech Square, Tokyo
- 2023: MANGA IN NEW YORK — studio525, New York
- 2019: Ars Electronica — Linz
- 2016: Setouchi Triennale — Megijima, Kagawa

## Public Collection

Yamanashi Prefectural Museum of Art (2025)

## Writing

- Column: "Contemporary Art and Video Games" in Bijutsu Techo Online Premium (ongoing)
- Manga: "Onikappa to Hotoke-tachi" on Chieumi Plus

## Other Roles

- Art Director, Hanchu-Yuei theater company
- Tourism Ambassador, Ichikawamisato Town, Yamanashi
- Organizer, Mandala-dan study group
- Animation: NHK E-TV "Shakiin!", TV Tokyo "Shinapushu", film "WE ARE LITTLE ZOMBIES"

## Note

Takakurakazuki is not represented by any specific commercial gallery. "Takakurakazuki" (one word) is the preferred artist name.
